# portfolio-manager-v2 Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-02-23

## Active Technologies
- Python 3.11 (backend), TypeScript 5.x + React 18 (frontend) + FastAPI, sqlite3, pandas, openpyxl, yfinance, React, axios, react-router-dom, recharts (001-wallet-rebalancing-recommendations)
- SQLite (`backend/data/portfolio.db`) (001-wallet-rebalancing-recommendations)
- Markdown + configuração MkDocs (`mkdocs.yml`) + shell tooling de suporte + Estrutura atual de `docs/`, `README.md`, `mkdocs.yml`, convenções internas do repositório (002-docs-limpeza-atualizada)
- Arquivos em repositório Git (sem persistência adicional) (002-docs-limpeza-atualizada)

- Python 3.11 (backend), TypeScript/React 18 (frontend) + FastAPI, SQLite, Pandas (backend); React, Vite, Recharts (frontend) (001-wallet-rebalancing-recommendations)
